case_title: MARTIN A. FRIEDMAN VS. GENEROCITY MEDIA INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,865.60 FILED BY FRIEDMAN, MARTIN A. AS TO DEFENDANT GENEROCITY MEDIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/26/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RTN TO SEND".
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO AMEND THE CLAIM. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $190.00 - SERVED SEP-14-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GENEROCITY MEDIA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN A. FRIEDMAN. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED TIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM: AMANDA FISHCHER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE, TO AMEND CLAIM AND SERVE AMENDED CLAIM, TO JAN-04-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN A. FRIEDMAN. DEFENDANT GENEROCITY MEDIA INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/13/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP - RTN TO SEND."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
